name: Baja California Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add tarragon vinegar, minced garlic, seasoned salt, and pepper to the pan.
4. Cook chicken breasts for about 10-12 minutes on each side until golden brown.
5. Remove chicken from the pan and transfer to a baking dish.
6. Pour sherry over the chicken.
7. Bake in the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve and enjoy!
